AgentColorRecord.description:
Palette color assigned to a worker-agent session.

Binary ``JzH(sessionFile,{type:"agent-color",agentColor,sessionId})``; written only
when the color is truthy (``"default"`` is skipped).
AgentColorRecord.title: AgentColorRecord

AgentListingDeltaAttachment.description: Agent registry changes — added/removed agent types for the Agent tool (Claude Code 2.1.90+).
AgentListingDeltaAttachment.title: AgentListingDeltaAttachment

AgentNameRecord.description:
Records the human-readable name assigned to a worker agent session.

Written to main session files to associate agent sessions with descriptive names.
AgentNameRecord.title: AgentNameRecord

AgentOutputToolInput.description: Input for AgentOutputTool - retrieves output from background agents.
AgentOutputToolInput.title: AgentOutputToolInput

AgentSettingRecord.title: AgentSettingRecord

AgentState.description: State of a background agent (may be running or completed).
AgentState.title: AgentState

AgentTeammateSpawnedResult.description: Result from Agent tool when spawning a teammate in team mode.
AgentTeammateSpawnedResult.title: AgentTeammateSpawnedResult

AgentsKilledSystemRecord.description:
System record emitted when running subagents are killed (subtype=agents_killed, Claude Code 2.1.139+).

Carries no payload beyond the base envelope; signals subagent termination
(e.g., on Esc / session interrupt).
AgentsKilledSystemRecord.title: AgentsKilledSystemRecord

AgentsRetrievalResult.description: Result from retrieving multiple agent states.
AgentsRetrievalResult.title: AgentsRetrievalResult

AiTitleRecord.description: AI-generated session title shown in the `/resume` UI.
AiTitleRecord.title: AiTitleRecord

AlreadyReadFileAttachment.description:
Reminder injected when Claude re-Reads an unchanged file in the same session.

Carries the cached snapshot the model has already seen so it can skip re-issuing
the Read tool. Shape mirrors FileAttachment exactly (filename + displayPath +
wrapped FileAttachmentContent), so the nested types are reused directly.
AlreadyReadFileAttachment.title: AlreadyReadFileAttachment

ArtifactToolInput.description:
Input for Artifact tool - publishes an .html/.md file to a private claude.ai page.

Binary strictObject ``{file_path, favicon (one or two emoji), label?, url?}``.
Introduced between Claude Code 2.1.163 and 2.1.172 (absent in 2.1.163).
ArtifactToolInput.title: ArtifactToolInput

AskUserQuestionToolInput.description:
Input for AskUserQuestion tool - asks user multiple choice questions.

Fields:
    questions: List of questions (1-4), each with question/header/options/multiSelect
    answers: User answers (populated by permission component)
AskUserQuestionToolInput.title: AskUserQuestionToolInput

parentUuid.description: UUID of parent record (null for root agent records)
parentUuid.title: Parentuuid

usage.description: Token usage for this request (null for agent records - usage in message instead)

model.description: Claude model identifier (null for agent records - model in message instead)
model.title: Model

agentId.description: Agent ID for subprocess/agent records (references agent-{agentId}.jsonl)
agentId.title: Agentid

isSidechain.description: Indicates sidechain/subprocess execution (present in agent records)
isSidechain.title: Issidechain

version.description: Claude Code version (present in agent records)

isApiErrorMessage.description: Indicates this message represents an API error
isApiErrorMessage.title: Isapierrormessage

error.description: Error type for API error messages
error.title: Error

teamName.description: Team name when running in multi-agent team mode
teamName.title: Teamname

errorDetails.description: API error details string (e.g., prompt too long)
errorDetails.title: Errordetails

apiErrorStatus.description: HTTP status code for API errors (e.g., 400, 529) (Claude Code 2.1.100+)
apiErrorStatus.title: Apierrorstatus

attributionAgent.description: Agent type attribution for assistant records emitted under a specific agent (Claude Code 2.1.121+); references the running agent name (e.g., "unrestricted-worker"). Typed str (not Literal) since values come from the user agent registry, matching the agentName/teamName precedent.
attributionAgent.title: Attributionagent

attributionPlugin.description: Active plugin name (e.g., "codex"); paired with attributionSkill when the assistant turn is emitted by a plugin-installed skill (Claude Code 2.1.121+).
attributionPlugin.title: Attributionplugin

attributionMcpServer.description: MCP server name attributed to an assistant turn that invoked an MCP tool (e.g., "selenium-browser"); paired with attributionMcpTool (Claude Code 2.1.149+).
attributionMcpServer.title: Attributionmcpserver

attributionMcpTool.description: MCP tool name attributed to the turn (e.g., "navigate"); paired with attributionMcpServer (Claude Code 2.1.149+).
attributionMcpTool.title: Attributionmcptool

AsyncTaskLaunchResult.description: Result from launching async Task (with or without output file tracking).
AsyncTaskLaunchResult.title: AsyncTaskLaunchResult

AttachmentRecord.description:
Attachment record for non-message content injected into sessions.

Shares BaseRecord fields plus UserRecord metadata fields. Distinguished
from UserRecord by having an 'attachment' field instead of 'message'.
AttachmentRecord.title: AttachmentRecord

AwaySummarySystemRecord.description:
System record for session recap (subtype=away_summary, Claude Code 2.1.108+).

Emitted when returning to an idle session to summarize prior goal/state.
Controlled by `/recap` or `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY`.
AwaySummarySystemRecord.title: AwaySummarySystemRecord

BackgroundTask.description: Background task state from TaskOutput tool polling.
BackgroundTask.title: BackgroundTask

BaseRecord.description: Base class for all session record types.
BaseRecord.title: BaseRecord

BashOutputToolInput.description:
Input for BashOutput tool - retrieves background bash output.

Fields:
    bash_id: Background task ID (required)
    block: Whether to wait for completion
    filter: Regex pattern to filter output
    wait_up_to: Max seconds to wait (for blocking mode)
BashOutputToolInput.title: BashOutputToolInput

BashOutputToolResult.description:
Result from BashOutput tool (background shell output).

Different from BashToolResult: requires shellId/command/status/exitCode
but does NOT have interrupted/isImage fields.
BashOutputToolResult.title: BashOutputToolResult

BashProgressData.description: Progress data for bash command execution.
BashProgressData.title: BashProgressData

BashToolInput.description:
Input for Bash tool - executes shell commands.

Fields:
    command: The shell command to execute (required)
    description: Human-readable description in 5-10 words (usually present, but optional)
    timeout: Timeout in milliseconds (max 600000, default 120000)
    run_in_background: Run command asynchronously
    dangerouslyDisableSandbox: Bypass sandbox protection (requires policy permission)
BashToolInput.title: BashToolInput

BridgeSessionRecord.description:
Records the remote-control bridge association for a session.

Resumption-state sidecar (no uuid/timestamp), written alongside
PermissionModeRecord. Binary: ``$.push({type:"bridge-session",sessionId:q,
bridgeSessionId:...,lastSequenceNum:...})``; emitted by /remote-control
bridge sessions. Distinct from BridgeStatusSystemRecord (a system subtype).
BridgeSessionRecord.title: BridgeSessionRecord

BridgeStatusSystemRecord.description: System record for remote-control bridge status (subtype=bridge_status, Claude Code 2.1.51+).
BridgeStatusSystemRecord.title: BridgeStatusSystemRecord

CacheMissReasonMessagesChanged.description:
Cache miss because messages earlier in the conversation changed.

Carries the count of input tokens that were not served from cache.
CacheMissReasonMessagesChanged.title: CacheMissReasonMessagesChanged

CacheMissReasonModelChanged.description:
Cache miss because the model changed mid-session.

Carries the count of input tokens that were not served from cache.
Server-emitted via the cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 Anthropic API beta
header, not present in the client binary (consistent with the other
CacheMissReason variants).
CacheMissReasonModelChanged.title: CacheMissReasonModelChanged

CacheMissReasonParamsChanged.description:
Cache miss because request parameters changed.

Carries the count of input tokens that were not served from cache.
CacheMissReasonParamsChanged.title: CacheMissReasonParamsChanged

CacheMissReasonPreviousMessageNotFound.description: Cache miss because the previous message couldn't be located in the cache.
CacheMissReasonPreviousMessageNotFound.title: CacheMissReasonPreviousMessageNotFound

CacheMissReasonSystemChanged.description:
Cache miss because the system prompt changed.

Carries the count of input tokens that were not served from cache.
CacheMissReasonSystemChanged.title: CacheMissReasonSystemChanged

CacheMissReasonToolsChanged.description:
Cache miss because tool definitions changed.

Carries the count of input tokens that were not served from cache.
CacheMissReasonToolsChanged.title: CacheMissReasonToolsChanged

CacheMissReasonUnavailable.description: Cache miss because cache lookup was unavailable for this request.
CacheMissReasonUnavailable.title: CacheMissReasonUnavailable

ClearThinkingEdit.description: Applied context edit for clearing thinking blocks.
ClearThinkingEdit.title: ClearThinkingEdit

CommandPermissionsAttachment.description: Tool allow-list applied by a slash command.
CommandPermissionsAttachment.title: CommandPermissionsAttachment

CompactFileReferenceAttachment.description: File reference injected after a compact operation.
CompactFileReferenceAttachment.title: CompactFileReferenceAttachment

ConnectionError.description: Connection error details for network failures.
ConnectionError.title: ConnectionError

ContentReplacement.description: A single tool-result replacement within a ContentReplacementRecord.
ContentReplacement.title: ContentReplacement

ContentReplacementRecord.description:
Replaces persisted tool-result content (compaction/fork dedup).

Binary has three write sites: bulk ``{type,sessionId,replacements}``; fork/clone adds
``uuid``+``timestamp``; per-agent (route-by-agent) adds ``agentId``. Each replacement
swaps a tool_use's stored output for a compacted form.
ContentReplacementRecord.title: ContentReplacementRecord

ContextManagement.description: Context management metadata for message responses (Claude Code 2.0.51+).
ContextManagement.title: ContextManagement

CronCreateToolInput.description: Input for CronCreate tool - schedules recurring prompts.
CronCreateToolInput.title: CronCreateToolInput

CronCreateToolResult.description: Result from CronCreate tool - confirms scheduled task creation.
CronCreateToolResult.title: CronCreateToolResult

CronDeleteToolInput.description: Input for CronDelete tool - cancels a scheduled cron job.
CronDeleteToolInput.title: CronDeleteToolInput

CronListToolInput.description: Input for CronList tool - lists scheduled cron jobs.
CronListToolInput.title: CronListToolInput

CustomTitleRecord.description: Custom title record for user-defined session names (minimal schema, no uuid).
CustomTitleRecord.title: CustomTitleRecord

DateChangeAttachment.description: Date rolled over mid-session — injected so Claude has the current date.
DateChangeAttachment.title: DateChangeAttachment

DeferredToolsDeltaAttachment.description: Deferred-tool registration changes for the tool-search system (Claude Code 2.1.120+).
DeferredToolsDeltaAttachment.title: DeferredToolsDeltaAttachment

DiagnosticSeverityRange.description: LSP-style position range for a diagnostic.
DiagnosticSeverityRange.title: DiagnosticSeverityRange

DiagnosticsAttachment.description: IDE diagnostics injected into the conversation.
DiagnosticsAttachment.title: DiagnosticsAttachment

DocumentContent.description: Document content block from user messages (PDF uploads, etc.).
DocumentContent.title: DocumentContent

DocumentSource.description: Document source data for document content (PDFs, etc.).
DocumentSource.title: DocumentSource

DynamicSkillAttachment.description: Skill discovered dynamically at a non-default location (Claude Code 2.1.x).
DynamicSkillAttachment.title: DynamicSkillAttachment

EditedTextFileAttachment.description:
File edited externally — snippet with line numbers shown to Claude.

displayPath is rare (~2% of observed records, only on more recent
Claude Code versions when the file is outside cwd); modeled optional.
EditedTextFileAttachment.title: EditedTextFileAttachment

EmptyError.description:
Unspecified API error object (Claude Code 2.0.76+).

Emitted either fields-less (``{}``) or as a bare ``{"type": null}`` -- a
network-error object whose ``cause`` was undefined at write time. The
optional null ``type`` mirrors ``NetworkError.type`` / ``ApiError.type``.
EmptyError.title: EmptyError

EnterWorktreeToolInput.description: Input for EnterWorktree tool - creates an isolated git worktree.
EnterWorktreeToolInput.title: EnterWorktreeToolInput

EnterWorktreeToolResult.description: Result from EnterWorktree tool - confirms worktree creation.
EnterWorktreeToolResult.title: EnterWorktreeToolResult

ExitPlanModeToolInput.description:
Input for ExitPlanMode tool - exits planning mode.

Note: This tool can be invoked with empty input {} or with plan/launchSwarm.
The empty variant signals plan approval request.

Fields:
    plan: Plan content in markdown (optional)
    launchSwarm: Whether to launch swarm agents (optional)
    allowedPrompts: Prompt-based permission requests (tool + prompt pairs)
    pushToRemote: Whether to push plan to remote Claude.ai session
ExitPlanModeToolInput.title: ExitPlanModeToolInput

ExitWorktreeToolInput.description: Input for ExitWorktree tool - exits the active worktree session (Claude Code 2.1.x).
ExitWorktreeToolInput.title: ExitWorktreeToolInput

ExitWorktreeToolResult.description: Result from ExitWorktree tool - confirms worktree exit (keep or remove).
ExitWorktreeToolResult.title: ExitWorktreeToolResult

FallbackContent.description:
Content block marking a mid-turn model fallback (Claude Fable 5 era).

Binary ``{type:"fallback",from:{model:H.fromModel},to:{model:H.model}}`` -- persisted
into assistant message content when a turn is served by a fallback model (e.g. a Fable
refusal retried on Opus). The sibling ``server_fallback`` stream event is never
persisted. ``from`` is a Python keyword -- aliased per the legitimate-alias rule.
FallbackContent.title: FallbackContent

FallbackModelRef.description: Model reference inside a FallbackContent from/to pair.
FallbackModelRef.title: FallbackModelRef

FastMcpMeta.description:
fastmcp-framework metadata surfaced on MCP tool results (Claude Code 2.1.118+).

Written by Python MCP servers built on the fastmcp library. Claude Code
forwards these `_meta.fastmcp` keys through to the session record.
FastMcpMeta.title: FastMcpMeta

FileAttachment.description: Generic file reference attached to the conversation.
FileAttachment.title: FileAttachment

FileAttachmentContent.description: Content wrapper for FileAttachment — carries the underlying text file.
FileAttachmentContent.title: FileAttachmentContent

FileAttachmentFileContent.description: File content payload nested inside FileAttachment.content.
FileAttachmentFileContent.title: FileAttachmentFileContent

FileBackupInfo.description: Backup information for a tracked file.
FileBackupInfo.title: FileBackupInfo

FileHistorySnapshot.description: Snapshot data for file history tracking.
FileHistorySnapshot.title: FileHistorySnapshot

FileHistorySnapshotRecord.description: File history snapshot record (different schema from regular records).
FileHistorySnapshotRecord.title: FileHistorySnapshotRecord

FileInfo.description: File information from Read tool (text files).
FileInfo.title: FileInfo

ForkContextRefRecord.description:
Subagent fork-context pointer linking a forked subagent journal to its parent.

Binary ``appendEntry({type:"fork-context-ref",agentId,parentSessionId,parentLastUuid,
contextLength})`` (route-by-agent -> ``subagents/agent-*.jsonl``). Minimal pointer:
no uuid/timestamp/sessionId/cwd envelope -- ``parentSessionId``/``parentLastUuid``
reference the parent instead.
ForkContextRefRecord.title: ForkContextRefRecord

ForkOrigin.description: Backpointer to the source session/message a forked session branched from.
ForkOrigin.title: ForkOrigin

GlobToolInput.description:
Input for Glob tool - file pattern matching.

Fields:
    pattern: Glob pattern to match files (e.g., "**/*.py")
    path: Directory to search in (defaults to cwd)
    limit: Max number of files to return (Claude Code 2.1.100+)
GlobToolInput.title: GlobToolInput

GlobToolResult.description: Result from Glob/file search tool execution.
GlobToolResult.title: GlobToolResult

GrepToolInput.description:
Input for Grep tool - searches file contents using ripgrep.

Fields:
    pattern: Regex pattern to search for (required)
    path: Directory or file to search in (defaults to cwd)
    output_mode: content | files_with_matches | count
    glob: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g., "*.py")
    type: File type filter (e.g., "py", "js")
    multiline: Enable multiline regex mode
    head_limit: Limit output to first N results
    offset: Skip first N results
    context_lines: Number of context lines (alternative to -C)
    flags: String-format flags (e.g., "-i")
    grep: Alternative flag format (e.g., "-n")
    Hyphenated flags: -n (line numbers), -A/-B/-C (context), -i (case insensitive)
GrepToolInput.title: GrepToolInput

GrepToolResult.description: Result from Grep/content search tool execution.
GrepToolResult.title: GrepToolResult

HookAdditionalContextAttachment.description: Hook returned additional context to inject into the conversation.
HookAdditionalContextAttachment.title: HookAdditionalContextAttachment

HookBlockingErrorAttachment.description: Hook returned a blocking error — tool execution was halted.
HookBlockingErrorAttachment.title: HookBlockingErrorAttachment

HookCancelledAttachment.description: Hook execution was cancelled (e.g., aborted before completion).
HookCancelledAttachment.title: HookCancelledAttachment

HookNonBlockingErrorAttachment.description: Hook returned a non-blocking error — tool continued.
HookNonBlockingErrorAttachment.title: HookNonBlockingErrorAttachment

HookSuccessAttachment.description: Hook executed successfully — result injected as session attachment.
HookSuccessAttachment.title: HookSuccessAttachment

ImageContent.description: Image content block from user messages.
ImageContent.title: ImageContent

ImageFileInfo.description: File information from Read tool (image files).
ImageFileInfo.title: ImageFileInfo

ImageSource.description: Image source data for image content.
ImageSource.title: ImageSource

InvokedSkill.description: A skill invocation record inside an InvokedSkillsAttachment.
InvokedSkill.title: InvokedSkill

InvokedSkillsAttachment.description:
Skills that were actually invoked for this turn (Claude Code 2.1.119+).

Distinct from dynamic_skill (discovery of a skill dir under cwd) and
skill_listing (periodic catalog of available skills): this attachment is
emitted when the user invokes one or more skills via /<skill-name>, and
carries the full skill content that was injected into the conversation.
InvokedSkillsAttachment.title: InvokedSkillsAttachment

IsolationLatchRecord.description:
Coordinator/worker isolation side for a session.

Binary ``Y$4(sessionFile,{type:"isolation-latch",side,sessionId})`` where
``side = isCoordinatorMode() ? "coordinator" : "normal"`` (same projection as
SessionModeRecord.mode).
IsolationLatchRecord.title: IsolationLatchRecord

KillShellMessageResult.description: Alternative KillShell result with message format (snake_case shell_id).
KillShellMessageResult.title: KillShellMessageResult

KillShellToolInput.description:
Input for KillShell tool - terminates a running shell.

Fields:
    shell_id: ID of the shell to kill (required)
KillShellToolInput.title: KillShellToolInput

LSPToolInput.description:
Input for LSP tool - Language Server Protocol operations.

Fields:
    operation: LSP operation to perform
    filePath: Path to the file to operate on
    line: Line number (1-based as shown in editors)
    character: Character offset (1-based as shown in editors)
LSPToolInput.title: LSPToolInput

LastPromptRecord.description:
Records the user's last prompt text.

Typically the final record in a session file. Claude Code 2.1.120+ also writes a
placeholder near session start with `lastPrompt` absent until the first user input.
Claude Code 2.1.121+ adds `leafUuid` referencing the latest message UUID in this
conversation branch (parallels SummaryRecord.leafUuid).
LastPromptRecord.title: LastPromptRecord

ListMcpResourcesToolInput.description:
Input for ListMcpResourcesTool - lists available MCP resources.

Fields:
    server: Filter by specific MCP server name (optional)
ListMcpResourcesToolInput.title: ListMcpResourcesToolInput

LocalCommandSystemRecord.description: System record for local command output (subtype=local_command).
LocalCommandSystemRecord.title: LocalCommandSystemRecord

MCPSearchToolInput.description:
Input for MCPSearch tool - searches for MCP tools.

Fields:
    query: Search query string, can use 'select:' prefix for exact tool selection
    max_results: Maximum number of results to return (optional, can be int or string)
MCPSearchToolInput.title: MCPSearchToolInput

MCPStructuredContent.description:
Permissive model for MCP tool structured content (in mcpMeta.structuredContent).

MCP tools are third-party integrations with varying result schemas. We
intentionally do not model their specific fields because:
1. There are 64+ different MCP tools with different result structures
2. They are user-configured and can change without Claude Code updates
3. Their schemas are defined by external MCP servers

NOTE: This is the NEW location for structured MCP content (Claude Code 2.1.19+).
The same data also appears in tool_result.content as a JSON string. See also
MCPToolResult which handles the toolUseResult field.

Uses PermissiveModel to accept any fields while maintaining type observability.
MCPStructuredContent.title: MCPStructuredContent

MCPToolInput.description:
Permissive model for MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool inputs.

MCP tools are third-party integrations with varying schemas. We intentionally
do not model their specific fields because:
1. There are 64+ different MCP tools with different schemas
2. They are user-configured and can change without Claude Code updates
3. Their schemas are defined by external MCP servers

The validator on ToolUseContent enforces that ONLY tools with names starting
with 'mcp__' can use this model. Claude Code built-in tools MUST have typed
models - if one falls through to MCPToolInput, the validator raises an error.

Uses PermissiveModel to accept any fields while maintaining type observability.
MCPToolInput.title: MCPToolInput

MCPToolResult.description:
Permissive model for MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool results.

MCP tools are third-party integrations with varying result schemas. We
intentionally do not model their specific fields because:
1. There are 64+ different MCP tools with different result structures
2. They are user-configured and can change without Claude Code updates
3. Their schemas are defined by external MCP servers

NOTE: Unlike MCPToolInput, we cannot validate that only MCP tools use this
fallback. Tool results don't carry the tool name (it's in the previous
assistant message's ToolUseContent). Observability is provided by
find_fallbacks() in validate_models.py instead.

Uses PermissiveModel to accept any fields while maintaining type observability.
MCPToolResult.title: MCPToolResult

McpInstructionsDeltaAttachment.description: MCP server instruction changes (added/removed tool descriptions).
McpInstructionsDeltaAttachment.title: McpInstructionsDeltaAttachment

McpMeta.description:
MCP tool metadata wrapper (Claude Code 2.1.19+).

New in 2.1.19: Claude Code extracts structured content from MCP tool
results that return valid JSON and surfaces it here for easier access.

DUPLICATION: The same data appears both here (as parsed dict) AND in
tool_result.content (as JSON string). This is a convenience feature
for programmatic access without parsing.

NOT BACKFILLED: Old sessions retain the old format (mcpMeta=None).
When you resume an old session, new tool calls get mcpMeta but old
records are not updated. Both patterns can coexist in the same file.

Only populated for MCP tools returning JSON - tools returning plain text
(like Perplexity) do not populate this field.

In 2.1.118+ the `_meta` field is no longer always empty: Claude Code began
forwarding framework-level metadata (e.g. fastmcp.wrap_result) written
by the MCP server into the session record.
McpMeta.title: McpMeta

McpMetaMetadata.description:
Implementation-framework metadata namespace on MCP tool results.

Corresponds to the MCP spec's `_meta` field, which servers use to
attach implementation-specific data. Currently only fastmcp is observed;
other MCP frameworks (FastMCP-TS, mcp-go, etc.) may add sibling keys here.
McpMetaMetadata.title: McpMetaMetadata

McpProgressCompletedData.description: Progress data for MCP tool completion.
McpProgressCompletedData.title: McpProgressCompletedData

McpProgressFailedData.description: Progress data for MCP tool failure.
McpProgressFailedData.title: McpProgressFailedData

McpProgressStartedData.description: Progress data for MCP tool start.
McpProgressStartedData.title: McpProgressStartedData

McpResource.description: A single MCP resource from ListMcpResourcesTool.
McpResource.title: McpResource

McpResourceContent.description: A single resource content item from ReadMcpResourceTool.
McpResourceContent.title: McpResourceContent

type.description: Message type indicator (present in agent/subprocess responses)
type.title: Type

stop_reason.description: Reason why the model stopped generating
stop_reason.title: Stop Reason

stop_sequence.description: The actual stop sequence string that triggered stopping
stop_sequence.title: Stop Sequence

usage.description: Token usage information (present in nested API responses)

diagnostics.description: Cache-miss diagnostics (Claude Code 2.1.119+); null when cache hit or unavailable

MessageDiagnostics.description:
Diagnostic metadata about request handling (Claude Code 2.1.119+).

Emitted via the `cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07` Anthropic API beta header.
Currently always reports prompt-cache outcome. May expand to other
diagnostic categories in future versions.
MessageDiagnostics.title: MessageDiagnostics

MicrocompactBoundarySystemRecord.description: System record for micro-compaction (subtype=microcompact_boundary, Claude Code 2.1.9+).
MicrocompactBoundarySystemRecord.title: MicrocompactBoundarySystemRecord

ModelFallbackSystemRecord.description:
System record for a model-availability fallback (subtype=model_fallback).

Binary yields ``{type:"system",subtype:"model_fallback",content:`Switched to ...`,
level:"warning",trigger,originalModel,fallbackModel}`` when the configured model is
unavailable (the fallbackModel setting); the if-guard restricts trigger to exactly
model_not_found | permission_denied. Producer present since ≤2.1.162. No
requestId/direction/apiRefusal* -- those belong to ModelRefusalFallbackSystemRecord.
ModelFallbackSystemRecord.title: ModelFallbackSystemRecord

ModelRefusalFallbackSystemRecord.description:
System record for an API-side model refusal triggering a fallback retry (subtype=model_refusal_fallback).

Binary ``{type:"system",subtype:"model_refusal_fallback",direction:"retry",content,
level:"warning",trigger:"refusal",originalModel,fallbackModel,requestId,
apiRefusalCategory,apiRefusalExplanation,retractedMessageUuids?}``. Producer present
since ≤2.1.162; surfaced in JSONL by Claude Fable 5 refusal fallbacks (2.1.170+).
originalModel/fallbackModel carry config-level ids including the ``[1m]`` context
suffix -- plain str, not ModelId.
ModelRefusalFallbackSystemRecord.title: ModelRefusalFallbackSystemRecord

MonitorToolInput.description: Input for Monitor tool - streams events from a long-running background script (Claude Code 2.1.98+).
MonitorToolInput.title: MonitorToolInput

NestedMemoryAttachment.description: Nested CLAUDE.md / memory file discovered under cwd.
NestedMemoryAttachment.title: NestedMemoryAttachment

NetworkDownConnection.description: Connection diagnostics for the network-down api_error variant (Claude Code 2.1.161+).
NetworkDownConnection.title: NetworkDownConnection

NetworkDownError.description:
Request-diagnostic api_error envelope (Claude Code 2.1.161+).

Covers network-down (connection = NetworkDownConnection, isNetworkDown true) and
request-timeout (connection null, isNetworkDown false) -- the binary builds connection
via ``VU(H)``, which returns null when there is no socket-level failure. Distinct from
ApiError (status/headers), NetworkError (cause), EmptyError (null-type-only), and
RetryableHttpError (has status): identified by formatted + isNetworkDown, no status.
NetworkDownError.title: NetworkDownError

NotebookEditToolInput.description:
Input for NotebookEdit tool - edits Jupyter notebook cells.

Fields:
    notebook_path: Absolute path to the .ipynb file (required)
    new_source: New source content for the cell (required)
    cell_id: ID of cell to edit (optional)
    cell_type: Type of cell - code or markdown
    edit_mode: replace | insert | delete
NotebookEditToolInput.title: NotebookEditToolInput

OpenedFileInIdeAttachment.description: File opened in the connected IDE (VSCode/JetBrains).
OpenedFileInIdeAttachment.title: OpenedFileInIdeAttachment

OutputTokensDetails.description:
Output-token breakdown (Anthropic API usage passthrough).

Server-emitted in message.usage; not a client-binary literal (same
server-diagnostic precedent as CacheMissReason).
OutputTokensDetails.title: OutputTokensDetails

PatchHunk.description: A single hunk in a git-style patch.
PatchHunk.title: PatchHunk

PdfFileInfo.description: File information from Read tool (PDF files).
PdfFileInfo.title: PdfFileInfo

PermissionModeRecord.description:
Records the active permission mode for a session.

Does NOT inherit from BaseRecord -- minimal schema with no uuid/timestamp.
PermissionModeRecord.title: PermissionModeRecord

PlanFileReferenceAttachment.description: Plan file content referenced in the conversation.
PlanFileReferenceAttachment.title: PlanFileReferenceAttachment

PlanModeAttachment.description: Plan mode reminder — injected while plan mode is active (Claude Code 2.1.112+).
PlanModeAttachment.title: PlanModeAttachment

PlanModeExitAttachment.description: User exited plan mode — recorded whether the plan file was written.
PlanModeExitAttachment.title: PlanModeExitAttachment

PlanModeReentryAttachment.description: User re-entered plan mode with a previously saved plan (Claude Code 2.1.112+).
PlanModeReentryAttachment.title: PlanModeReentryAttachment

PrLinkRecord.description: PR link record created when Claude Code opens a pull request.
PrLinkRecord.title: PrLinkRecord

PreservedCompactMessages.description: Preserved-message anchors carried across a compaction.
PreservedCompactMessages.title: PreservedCompactMessages

PreservedCompactSegment.description: Anchor UUIDs identifying the conversation segment preserved across an auto-compact.
PreservedCompactSegment.title: PreservedCompactSegment

ProgressRecord.description: Progress record for tracking long-running operations (Claude Code 2.1.9+).

teamName.description: Team name when running in multi-agent team mode
teamName.title: Teamname

ProgressRecord.title: ProgressRecord

PromptPermission.description: A prompt-based permission request in ExitPlanMode.
PromptPermission.title: PromptPermission

PushNotificationToolInput.description: Input for PushNotification tool - sends a desktop/mobile notification (Claude Code 2.1.110+).
PushNotificationToolInput.title: PushNotificationToolInput

QueryUpdateData.description: Progress data for search query update (Claude Code 2.1.9+).
QueryUpdateData.title: QueryUpdateData

QuestionAnnotation.description: Annotation on a user's answer to a question (Claude Code 2.1.45+).
QuestionAnnotation.title: QuestionAnnotation

QuestionOption.description: A single option in a user question.
QuestionOption.title: QuestionOption

QueueOperationRecord.description: Queue operation record (minimal schema, no uuid).

content.description: User input content for the queued operation (string or structured message)
content.title: Content

QueueOperationRecord.title: QueueOperationRecord

QueuedCommandAttachment.description: User command queued while Claude was working. prompt may be str or content blocks.

source_uuid.description: UUID of the source message that triggered this queued command. Rare (1/355 globally observed); only seen with commandMode="prompt". Set by the SDK replay path (Claude Code 2.1.20+ — `SDKUserMessageReplay` events when `replayUserMessages` is enabled). Note: snake_case in the wire schema, anomalous vs surrounding camelCase fields.
source_uuid.title: Source Uuid

origin.description: Queued-command origin (Claude Code 2.1.157+); see UserRecordOrigin for the kind set.

QueuedCommandAttachment.title: QueuedCommandAttachment

RateLimitInfo.description:
Rate-limit fields copied from the server ``anthropic-ratelimit-unified-*`` headers.

``rateLimitType`` is a pass-through ``str``, NOT a Literal: the producer writes the raw
header value, so the set is server-defined, not binary-enumerated. The binary only
*consumes* a known subset (``five_hour``/``seven_day``/``seven_day_opus``/
``seven_day_sonnet``) -- per the binary-proven gate, consumer checks don't gate, and a
Literal would reject server-added types the producer passes through. ``resetsAt`` is a
unix epoch from the ``-reset`` header.
RateLimitInfo.title: RateLimitInfo

ReadFileUnchangedFileInfo.description: File info for Read tool 'file_unchanged' variant — file content unchanged since last read.
ReadFileUnchangedFileInfo.title: ReadFileUnchangedFileInfo

ReadFileUnchangedToolResult.description: Result from Read tool when file is unchanged since last read (Claude Code 2.1.x).
ReadFileUnchangedToolResult.title: ReadFileUnchangedToolResult

ReadImageToolResult.description: Result from Read tool execution (image files).
ReadImageToolResult.title: ReadImageToolResult

ReadMcpResourceToolInput.description:
Input for ReadMcpResourceTool - reads a specific MCP resource.

Fields:
    server: MCP server name (required)
    uri: Resource URI to read (required)
ReadMcpResourceToolInput.title: ReadMcpResourceToolInput

ReadPartsFileInfo.description: File info for Read tool 'parts' variant — PDF split into per-page tool-result files.
ReadPartsFileInfo.title: ReadPartsFileInfo

ReadPartsToolResult.description: Result from Read tool execution (large PDF split into parts) (Claude Code 2.1.x).
ReadPartsToolResult.title: ReadPartsToolResult

ReadPdfToolResult.description: Result from Read tool execution (PDF files).
ReadPdfToolResult.title: ReadPdfToolResult

ReadTextToolResult.description: Result from Read tool execution (text files).
ReadTextToolResult.title: ReadTextToolResult

ReadToolInput.description:
Input for Read tool.

Fields:
    file_path: Absolute path to the file to read
    limit: Maximum number of lines to read (for large files)
    offset: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed)
ReadToolInput.title: ReadToolInput

RemoteTriggerToolInput.description:
Input for the RemoteTrigger tool — claude.ai routines API (Claude Code 2.1.81+).

Binary inputSchema: {action: enum[list|get|create|update|run] (required),
trigger_id?, body?}. Only `action` appears in observed session data
(`{"action": "list"}`), so it alone is modeled.
RemoteTriggerToolInput.title: RemoteTriggerToolInput

RetryableHttpError.description:
Retryable HTTP api_error (429 rate_limit / 529 overloaded) with the network-diagnostic envelope.

The server responded with a retryable status, so this carries HTTP ``status`` +
``requestId`` alongside the same ``formatted``/``connection``/``isNetworkDown``/
``rateLimits`` envelope as NetworkDownError. Distinct from ApiError (``headers`` +
capital-D ``requestID``) and NetworkDownError (no ``status``; ``connection`` is an
object): identified by required ``status`` + the envelope. ``connection``/``rateLimits``
are null on a server-side HTTP error (the socket reached the server). Same binary error
reducer as NetworkDownError. Spans Claude Code 2.1.161+.
RetryableHttpError.title: RetryableHttpError

SavedHookContextRecord.description: Saved hook context record for persisting hook output across session boundaries.
SavedHookContextRecord.title: SavedHookContextRecord

ScheduleWakeupToolInput.description:
Input for ScheduleWakeup tool - arms a /loop dynamic-mode wake heartbeat.

delaySeconds is the API contract type (zod number, clamped to [60, 3600]
by the runtime).
ScheduleWakeupToolInput.title: ScheduleWakeupToolInput

ScheduledTaskFireSystemRecord.description:
System record for scheduled task execution (subtype=scheduled_task_fire, Claude Code 2.1.85+).

Emitted as a transcript marker when /loop or CronCreate tasks fire.
ScheduledTaskFireSystemRecord.title: ScheduledTaskFireSystemRecord

SearchResultsReceivedData.description: Progress data for web search results received (Claude Code 2.1.9+).
SearchResultsReceivedData.title: SearchResultsReceivedData

SelectedLinesInIdeAttachment.description: Lines selected in the connected IDE.
SelectedLinesInIdeAttachment.title: SelectedLinesInIdeAttachment

SendMessageLegacyToolInput.description: Pre-refactor SendMessage wire shape (Claude Code 2.1.63): type/recipient/content, no to/message.
SendMessageLegacyToolInput.title: SendMessageLegacyToolInput

SendMessageRouting.description: Routing metadata for a sent message between team members.
SendMessageRouting.title: SendMessageRouting

SendMessageShutdownRequest.description: Control-message body requesting a teammate shut down.
SendMessageShutdownRequest.title: SendMessageShutdownRequest

SendMessageShutdownResponse.description: Control-message body answering a shutdown request.
SendMessageShutdownResponse.title: SendMessageShutdownResponse

SendMessageToolInput.description:
Input for SendMessage tool — post-backfill wire shape.

Claude Code's `backfillObservableInput` derives top-level fields from `to`/`message`.
For an object `message` (control body): `type` = message.type, `recipient` = to (always),
`request_id`/`approve` are copied up iff present, and `content` = `message.reason ?? message.feedback`
(so `content` is absent when the control body carries neither). `reason`/`feedback` never appear as
top-level keys. For a string `message`: `type='message'`, `recipient` = to, `content` = message.
The raw two-field form is SendMessageSimpleToolInput.
SendMessageToolInput.title: SendMessageToolInput

SendMessageToolResult.description: Result from SendMessage tool - confirms message delivery between teammates.
SendMessageToolResult.title: SendMessageToolResult

SendUserFileToolInput.description:
Input for the SendUserFile tool — delivers files to the user (Claude Code 2.1.142+).

Binary inputSchema: {files: array(string).min(1) (required), status: enum[normal|proactive]
(required), caption?}. Surfaces artifacts (screenshots, reports) — `proactive` pushes
unprompted, `normal` accompanies a reply.
SendUserFileToolInput.title: SendUserFileToolInput

SessionModeRecord.description:
Records the active session mode for a session.

Resumption-state sidecar written alongside PermissionModeRecord; does NOT
inherit from BaseRecord -- minimal schema with no uuid/timestamp. Binary
``$.push({type:"mode",mode:this.currentSessionMode,sessionId:q})`` where mode is
``isCoordinatorMode() ? "coordinator" : "normal"`` (same projection as
IsolationLatchRecord.side).
SessionModeRecord.title: SessionModeRecord

SimpleThinkingMetadata.description:
Simplified thinking metadata (Claude Code 2.1.19+).

New format that only specifies max thinking tokens without
the full level/disabled/triggers configuration.
See also ThinkingMetadata for the original full format.
SimpleThinkingMetadata.title: SimpleThinkingMetadata

SkillListingAttachment.description: Periodic listing of available skills (Claude Code 2.1.x).
SkillListingAttachment.title: SkillListingAttachment

SkillToolInput.description:
Input for Skill tool.

Fields:
    skill: Skill name to invoke (e.g., 'handoff', 'commit')
    args: Optional arguments for the skill
SkillToolInput.title: SkillToolInput

SpeculationAcceptRecord.description:
Records a speculative-decoding acceptance and the wall-time it saved.

Binary ``appendFile(sessionFile,{type:"speculation-accept",timestamp,timeSavedMs})``,
written only when ``timeSavedMs > 0``. No sessionId/uuid envelope.
SpeculationAcceptRecord.title: SpeculationAcceptRecord

StopHookSummarySystemRecord.description: System record for stop hook summary (subtype=stop_hook_summary, Claude Code 2.1.14+).
StopHookSummarySystemRecord.title: StopHookSummarySystemRecord

StructuredOutputToolInput.description:
Input for the StructuredOutput built-in (Workflow structured output, 2.1.146+).

The tool's binary inputSchema is z.object({}).passthrough() — an arbitrary, caller-defined
payload (the workflow's per-call JSON Schema), so no fields are modeled. A distinct named type
(vs the MCP fallback) keeps the artifact observably a Claude Code built-in; ToolUseContent
re-types it from the permissive fallback — it is never matched directly, since MCPToolInput
catches first in the left-to-right union.
StructuredOutputToolInput.title: StructuredOutputToolInput

SummaryRecord.description:
Session summary record (minimal schema, no uuid/timestamp).

NOTE: Zero occurrences observed in recent sessions (50+ files, 521K+ records).
Compaction now uses UserRecord with isCompactSummary=True instead.
This type may be from an earlier Claude Code version. Kept for backward compatibility.
SummaryRecord.title: SummaryRecord

TagRecord.description:
User-assigned session tag.

Binary rich path ``append([{type:"tag",tag,sessionId,uuid,timestamp}])`` (set-tag
handler); the metadata-reemit path ``$.push({type:"tag",tag,sessionId})`` omits
uuid/timestamp. ``tag`` is ``""`` when cleared. Distinct from the slash-command
parser's ``{type:"tag",path,push,...}``, which is not a record.
TagRecord.title: TagRecord

TaskCreateToolInput.description:
Input for TaskCreate tool - creates a new task in the task list.

Fields:
    subject: Brief title for the task (imperative form, e.g., "Run tests")
    description: Detailed description of what needs to be done
    activeForm: Present continuous form shown in spinner (e.g., "Running tests")
    metadata: Arbitrary caller metadata; binary schema: v.record(v.string(), v.unknown()).optional()
TaskCreateToolInput.title: TaskCreateToolInput

TaskGetItem.description: A task item in TaskGet results (full detail).
TaskGetItem.title: TaskGetItem

TaskGetToolResult.description: Result from TaskGet tool - single task with full details.
TaskGetToolResult.title: TaskGetToolResult

TaskListItem.description: A task item in TaskList results.
TaskListItem.title: TaskListItem

TaskListToolInput.description: Input for TaskList tool - lists all tasks (no parameters).
TaskListToolInput.title: TaskListToolInput

TaskListToolResult.description: Result from TaskList tool - list of all tasks.
TaskListToolResult.title: TaskListToolResult

TaskOutputPollingResult.description: Result from TaskOutput tool - polling background task state.
TaskOutputPollingResult.title: TaskOutputPollingResult

TaskOutputToolInput.description: Input for TaskOutput tool - retrieves output from running/completed tasks.
TaskOutputToolInput.title: TaskOutputToolInput

TaskReminderAttachment.description: Task list reminder injected into the conversation (Claude Code 2.1.x).
TaskReminderAttachment.title: TaskReminderAttachment

TaskReminderItem.description: Task entry within a task_reminder attachment.
TaskReminderItem.title: TaskReminderItem

TaskSingleItem.description: A task item in TaskCreate/TaskUpdate results (minimal fields).
TaskSingleItem.title: TaskSingleItem

TaskSingleToolResult.description: Result from TaskCreate/TaskUpdate - single task confirmation.
TaskSingleToolResult.title: TaskSingleToolResult

TaskStatusAttachment.description:
Background-execution status delta (the ``claude agents`` / Agent-tool runtime).

A "task" here is a background job (``taskType`` local_agent | local_bash; for an agent
``taskId`` IS the agentId) -- the runtime sense, NOT the TaskCreate/TaskUpdate TODO
tracker (tell them apart by status: TODO is pending/in_progress/completed; runtime is
queued/running/completed/failed/killed). Binary ``{type:"task_status",taskId,taskType,
status,description,deltaSummary,outputFilePath}``; ``deltaSummary`` is the running
progress summary else the error (nullable). ``status`` is binary-enumerated (literal
write sites), unlike server pass-throughs like RateLimitInfo.rateLimitType.
TaskStatusAttachment.title: TaskStatusAttachment

TaskToolInput.description:
Input for Task tool - launches subagent for autonomous tasks.

Fields:
    prompt: Task instructions for the subagent (required)
    subagent_type: Agent type - "Explore", "general-purpose", etc. (required)
    description: Human-readable task description for UI (usually present but optional)
    allowed_tools: Tools to grant the subagent (e.g., ["Write", "Bash"])
    run_in_background: Run asynchronously, check with TaskOutput
    model: Override model (e.g., "haiku", "sonnet")
    resume: Agent ID to resume from previous execution
    mode: Permission mode for the agent (Claude Code 2.1.19+)
TaskToolInput.title: TaskToolInput

TaskToolStats.description: Per-subagent tool-use statistics returned with TaskToolResult (Claude Code 2.1.x).
TaskToolStats.title: TaskToolStats

TaskUpdateToolInput.description:
Input for TaskUpdate tool - updates an existing task.

Fields:
    taskId: ID of the task to update (required)
    status: New status (pending, in_progress, completed)
    description: New description for the task
    owner: Agent/worker name to assign the task to
    addBlockedBy: Task IDs that block this task
    metadata: Arbitrary caller metadata; binary schema: v.record(v.string(), v.unknown()).optional()
TaskUpdateToolInput.title: TaskUpdateToolInput

TeamCreateToolInput.description: Input for TeamCreate tool - creates a multi-agent team.
TeamCreateToolInput.title: TeamCreateToolInput

TeamCreateToolResult.description: Result from TeamCreate tool - confirms team creation.
TeamCreateToolResult.title: TeamCreateToolResult

TextContent.description: Text content block from user or assistant messages.
TextContent.title: TextContent

ThinkingContent.description: Thinking content block from assistant messages.
ThinkingContent.title: ThinkingContent

ThinkingMetadata.description:
Thinking configuration metadata (full format, pre-2.1.19).

This is the original format with level/disabled/triggers configuration.
See also SimpleThinkingMetadata for the newer simplified format.
ThinkingMetadata.title: ThinkingMetadata

ThinkingTrigger.description: A thinking trigger with position information.
ThinkingTrigger.title: ThinkingTrigger

TodoItem.description: A single todo item from TodoWrite tool.
TodoItem.title: TodoItem

TodoWriteToolInput.description:
Input for TodoWrite tool - tracks task progress.

Fields:
    todos: List of todo items, each with content/status/activeForm
TodoWriteToolInput.title: TodoWriteToolInput

TokenUsage.description: Token usage information for assistant messages.
TokenUsage.title: TokenUsage

ToolReferenceContent.description:
Tool reference content block from MCPSearch tool results (Claude Code 2.1.4+).

Appears in tool_result content when MCPSearch returns matched MCP tools.
ToolReferenceContent.title: ToolReferenceContent

ToolResultContent.description: Tool result content block from user messages.
ToolResultContent.title: ToolResultContent

ToolUseCaller.description: Caller metadata for tool use (Claude Code 2.1.4+).
ToolUseCaller.title: ToolUseCaller

ToolUseContent.description: Tool use content block from assistant messages.
ToolUseContent.title: ToolUseContent

TurnDurationSystemRecord.description: System record for turn duration tracking (subtype=turn_duration, Claude Code 2.1.1+).
TurnDurationSystemRecord.title: TurnDurationSystemRecord

UltrathinkEffortAttachment.description:
Ultrathink effort-level indicator for the turn (Claude Code 2.1.139+).

Marker injected when an ultrathink trigger raises the turn's thinking
effort; carries no payload beyond the type tag.
UltrathinkEffortAttachment.title: UltrathinkEffortAttachment

UsageIteration.description:
A single internal iteration within a turn's token usage (Claude Code 2.1.100+).

Populated when the turn runs multiple internal inference iterations
(e.g., adaptive thinking with tool loops). All 6 fields are always present.
UsageIteration.title: UsageIteration

UserQuestion.description: A question to ask the user.
UserQuestion.title: UserQuestion

projectPaths.description: Additional project paths beyond cwd (each path will be translated)

budgetTokens.description: Token budget limit for this request
budgetTokens.title: Budgettokens

agentId.description: Agent ID for subprocess/agent records (references agent-{agentId}.jsonl)
agentId.title: Agentid

isMeta.description: UI visibility flag: true = sent to Claude API but hidden from user terminal. Primary source: skill/command content injection (the full SKILL.md content Claude acts on). Also: local-command caveats, auto-resume prompts, system context injection. Absent/false = visible in terminal.
isMeta.title: Ismeta

thinkingMetadata.description: Extended thinking configuration (Claude 3.7+, simplified format in 2.1.19+)
thinkingMetadata.title: Thinkingmetadata

isVisibleInTranscriptOnly.description: Archival record: saved to JSONL but hidden from terminal UI. Claude Code manages API inclusion during context reconstruction (e.g., on session resume). Only observed with isCompactSummary=True (compact summary UserRecords).
isVisibleInTranscriptOnly.title: Isvisibleintranscriptonly

isCompactSummary.description: Marks this as a compact summary. Always paired with isVisibleInTranscriptOnly=True. The two-record compaction pattern: compact_boundary system record followed immediately by a UserRecord with this flag containing the summary text. This replaced the standalone SummaryRecord mechanism.
isCompactSummary.title: Iscompactsummary

imagePasteIds.description: IDs of pasted images in this message
imagePasteIds.title: Imagepasteids

sourceToolUseID.description: Tool use ID that generated this message (e.g., toolu_015eZkLKZz5JVkGC1zZrnnKm) (Claude Code 2.0.76+)
sourceToolUseID.title: Sourcetooluseid

sourceToolAssistantUUID.description: UUID of the assistant message that created the tool use this record responds to
sourceToolAssistantUUID.title: Sourcetoolassistantuuid

permissionMode.description: Permission mode for the request (Claude Code 2.1.15+)
permissionMode.title: Permissionmode

planContent.description: Plan content for plan mode submissions
planContent.title: Plancontent

mcpMeta.description: MCP tool structured content metadata (Claude Code 2.1.19+)

promptSource.description: Prompt origin (Claude Code 2.1.161+): non-interactive→'sdk', isMeta→'system', queued-replay→'queued', else 'typed'.
promptSource.title: Promptsource

teamName.description: Team name when running in multi-agent team mode
teamName.title: Teamname

agentName.description: Agent name within team (may be absent for lead agent)
agentName.title: Agentname

interruptedMessageId.description: API message ID (msg_*) of the assistant message interrupted by this user input (Claude Code 2.1.149+).
interruptedMessageId.title: Interruptedmessageid

UserRecordOrigin.description:
Origin metadata shared by UserRecord.origin and QueuedCommandAttachment.origin (2.1.87+).

kind is the closed origin-producer set. 'human' gained a real write site in 2.1.172
(resume-background-agent path); before that it was consumer-guard-only.
UserRecordOrigin.title: UserRecordOrigin

WaitingForTaskData.description: Progress data for waiting on a task.
WaitingForTaskData.title: WaitingForTaskData

WebFetchToolInput.description:
Input for WebFetch tool - fetches URL content.

Fields:
    url: URL to fetch (required)
    prompt: Prompt to run on fetched content (required)
WebFetchToolInput.title: WebFetchToolInput

WebSearchNestedResult.description: Result from WebSearch tool with nested structure variant.
WebSearchNestedResult.title: WebSearchNestedResult

WebSearchResultWrapper.description: Wrapper for web search results with tool use ID (nested structure variant).
WebSearchResultWrapper.title: WebSearchResultWrapper

WebSearchToolInput.description:
Input for WebSearch tool - web search.

Fields:
    query: Search query string (required)
    allowed_domains: Only include results from these domains
    blocked_domains: Exclude results from these domains
WebSearchToolInput.title: WebSearchToolInput

WorkflowKeywordRequestAttachment.description:
Workflow-trigger keyword detected in the prompt (Claude Code 2.1.153+).

Marker injected when a prompt's "workflow" keyword may trigger a dynamic
workflow; carries no payload beyond the type tag.
WorkflowKeywordRequestAttachment.title: WorkflowKeywordRequestAttachment

WorkflowToolInput.description:
Input for the Workflow tool — multi-agent orchestration (Claude Code 2.1.146+).

Binary inputSchema: {script?, name?, scriptPath?, resumeFromRunId?, args?,
description?, title?} — all optional (a refine requires one of script/name/scriptPath).
The inline-script (`script`), on-disk-script (`scriptPath`), and saved-workflow (`name` + `args`)
forms all appear in observed data; description/title remain binary-only and unmodeled.
`args` is an arbitrary caller-supplied JSON value passed verbatim to the run.
WorkflowToolInput.title: WorkflowToolInput

WorktreeSessionData.description: Worktree session metadata embedded in WorktreeStateRecord.
WorktreeSessionData.title: WorktreeSessionData

WorktreeStateRecord.description:
Records worktree state at the start of a worktree session (line 1 only).

Does NOT inherit from BaseRecord -- minimal schema with no uuid/timestamp.
WorktreeStateRecord.title: WorktreeStateRecord

title: Claude Code Session Record
description: Complete schema for Claude Code session JSONL records
